[[File:Angst.svg|thumb]]
Angst is a state of fundamental uncertainty and the stress of it. It is one of the [[Seven Plagues|Nine Plagues]]

This is not merely social anxiety but represents an issue of a disconnect with yourself as an agent. It has been talked about by existentialist philosophers and in the context of Justice vs Love among other inner conflicts.<ref>{{Cite web|last=Immanuelle|date=2022-07-14|title=The Nine Plagues and Ninefold Vaccine|url=https://evolution.faith/ninefold-vaccine/|access-date=2022-11-14|website=The Church of Evolution|language=en-US}}</ref> This is why it was renamed Angst from Anxiety as [[John Vervaeke]] called it

[[Saint Paul]] very notably suffered from Angst in his discourses on Justice vs Love. As a result [[Pauline Christianity]] is poisoned by Angst

[[Inner Dialogue]] is the [[booster shot]] for Angst

== History ==
Prominent in Christianity, ill addressed throughout Western history

== References ==
[[Category:Angst]]
[[Category:Domicide]]
[[Category:Perrenial Problems]]
[[sn:Angst]][[Category:Nine Plagues]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Angst]][[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Oldest pages before the refresh]]
[[Category:Pages]]
